summary: Comcast | Limit Ad Tracking (is_lat) Parameter to DAI - Live Game
description:
GIVEN a user is entitled for Live game playback
AND the user has opted into "Limit Ad Tracking"
OR the user has opted out of "Limit Ad Tracking"

*NOTE:*
Launch the app in the browser, open the Network tab in DevTools (filter 'streams'), start a video

steps.action: WHEN a user initiates playback of a live game
steps.result: THEN parameter {{is_lat}} is passed for users based upon {{lmt}} API value from Comcast (true / false)
